metadata.name: Issue a Request for Information List

description: At the start of fieldwork, an auditor sends a formal request list (sometimes called a PBC list) to the auditee.

nodes.task_description: Based on the audit plan, create a detailed list of all documents and data needed from the auditee.

expected_outcome.value: A comprehensive 'Provided by Client' (PBC) list is drafted.

nodes.task_description: Send the PBC list to the primary audit contact for the business unit.

expected_outcome.value: The auditee receives the formal request list.

nodes.task_description: Track the status of each requested item in a tracking log, following up on overdue items.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor actively manages the collection of evidence against the request list.
